title: POST /api/imports returns 415 for valid CSV files uploaded from Excel on Windows
body:
We embed Acme Importer in our back-office tooling and a whole class of our users can't upload CSVs.

What happens:

- User saves a file from Excel on Windows as `orders.csv`
- Our client posts it to `POST /api/imports`
- Response: `415 {"error":"Unsupported content type: application/vnd.ms-excel"}`

Windows registers the `.csv` extension to Excel with the `application/vnd.ms-excel` MIME type, so that's what our HTTP layer sends. The exact same file uploaded from macOS goes through fine as `text/csv`.

While testing this we also noticed uploads fail when the client appends a charset (`text/csv;charset=utf-8`) - some of our fetch paths add that automatically.

Could the endpoint accept the standard aliases/parameters for CSV? Happy to open a PR if you point me at the right place.
